Legal statement

Scope

This website is provided by Switzerland Omics for general information. Content may change without notice.

No warranty

We aim to keep information accurate and up to date. We make no representation or warranty, express or implied, as to accuracy, completeness, reliability, or fitness for a particular purpose.

Limitation of liability

To the extent permitted by law, Switzerland Omics is not liable for any loss or damage arising from access to, use of, or reliance on this website. This includes direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages.

Third party links

Links to third party websites are provided for convenience. Switzerland Omics does not control, endorse, or accept responsibility for third party content, products, services, or privacy practices.

No offer or solicitation

Nothing on this website constitutes an offer, solicitation, or recommendation to buy, sell, or transact in any securities. Any investment decisions should be made on the basis of independent advice.

Intellectual property

Unless stated otherwise, content on this website is owned by Switzerland Omics or used under licence. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or republish content without prior written permission, except where permitted by law.

Trademarks

Switzerland Omics® is a registered Swiss trademark. Other names and marks may be trademarks of their respective owners.

Contact

Requests for permission, corrections, or legal enquiries can be made via the contact page.
